editorNotes.purpose: Lists Markdown fragments concatenated (in order) into the CORE half of the own-engine system prompt. Core rules are immutable product constraints that never vary per request. The DIRECTIVES half (config/codegen-directives-manifest.json) contains adaptive prompt modules resolved through the Directive Cascade.
doNotPutInTheseFiles: Per-request custom instructions from the builder UI
Full scaffold JSON or serialized scaffold body
Route plan, pre-generation contracts, template-library matches
Structured brief fields from deep brief (unless you intentionally duplicate — avoid)
Visual design quality rules that vary per domain/tone (those belong in directives)
editorNotes.migrationNote: Consolidated from 15 fragments in the previous config/codegen-static-prompt.json. The old manifest is kept as a fallback during migration.
